blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw (source), staging, tgt (warehouse), and ctl (control) libraries, %LET control parameters (etl_run_id, batch_size, default_watermark), and OPTIONS

Parameterized %MACRO incremental_load(src_lib=, src_table=, tgt_lib=, tgt_table=, key_col=, ts_col=) — retrieves watermark from ctl.etl_watermarks, uses %IF/%ELSE to branch between initial and incremental load, extracts delta via DATA step, upserts into target via PROC SQL delete+insert, and updates watermark control table
Table configuration via %LET: defines table_count=4 and per-table source/target/key mappings for customers, products, orders, and shipments
Driver loop macro %macro run_etl_batch wrapping %DO i=1 %TO &table_count — iterates over configured tables and invokes %incremental_load with resolved &&tbl&i parameters for each table
Invocation of %run_etl_batch to execute the batch ETL process across all 4 configured tables
Open-code %IF/%ELSE conditional block: if &syserr > 0, creates staging.etl_error_log with error details and halts validation; otherwise emits success note
DATA step creating tgt.etl_load_summary audit record with batch_id, load timestamp, tables_processed count, and load status
PROC SQL validating post-load target table row counts via UNION ALL across tgt.dim_customer, tgt.dim_product, tgt.fact_orders, and tgt.fact_shipping
PROC DATASETS deleting staging delta tables (delta_dim_customer, delta_dim_product, delta_fact_orders, delta_fact_shipping) from staging library
LIBNAME CLEAR for raw and staging libraries, and batch completion log message
